strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with Node.js, TypeScript, and React matching primary stack
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, aligning with AI agent development requirement
Strong testing/TDD background including Vitest-adjacent frameworks, workshop teaching, and authoring a test runner (Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears limited and dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
Cloud experience shown for AWS via CDK at Optilyz, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective self-hosting

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with extensive full-stack work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq. Direct evidence of AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq satisfies the AI agent development requirement. Testing expertise is strong, evidenced by authoring the Trial test runner and Fluent-Asserts library, plus teaching TDD/Selenium courses. Database experience covers MongoDB (Optilyz) and SQL/MySQL. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js mention and limited recent Kotlin/Java, though polyglot background suggests fast ramp-up. AWS CDK experience at Optilyz covers cloud, but Kubernetes depth is mainly self-directed via GISCollective.
